## Why It Belongs in SkillForge

**Why is this skill worth learning deliberately?**
<!-- What does mastery enable? Why do most people lack it? -->

**Why is AI well-suited to teach it?**
<!-- Not all skills belong here. What specifically can AI do to accelerate learning this skill? -->

**What AI cannot replace in learning this skill?**
<!-- Be honest. Does this skill require human feedback, real-world practice, or other non-AI components? -->

Step 1: Self-assessment

## Proposed Graduation Test

<!-- What specific task, done without AI assistance, would prove mastery?
Be concrete — vague graduation tests are a common failure mode. -->

## Are you planning to build this?

- [ ] Yes, I want to build this module
- [ ] I'm proposing it for someone else to build
- [ ] I can help but need a co-contributor
